page_metadata.biotools__summary: GRiNCH (Graph-Regularized NMF and Clustering for Hi-C) is a tool for simultaneous smoothing and detection of topological units of genome organization from sparse chromatin contact count matrices with matrix factorization.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GRiNCH (Graph-Regularized NMF and Clustering for Hi-C) is a tool for simultaneous smoothing and detection of topological units of genome organization from sparse chromatin contact count matrices with matrix factorization.
